query:
-- Rotten Deals: add rottenThresholdDays to pipelines (per-pipeline config)
ALTER TABLE pipelines ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rottenDays INT DEFAULT 14;

-- Win/Loss: add wonReason to deals (lostReason already exists)
ALTER TABLE deals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wonReason TEXT;
ALTER TABLE deals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS closeNote TEXT;

-- Audit Logs table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  userEmail VARCHAR(320),
  userName VARCHAR(256),
  action VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  entityType VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  entityId INT,
  entityName VARCHAR(512),
  changes JSON,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(64),
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

-- Smart Views (saved filter sets)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS smart_views (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  entityType VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  filters JSON NOT NULL,
  isShared TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

-- Territories table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS territories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  assignedUserIds JSON,
  rules JSON,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

-- Contact territory assignment
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS territoryId INT;
ALTER TABLE companies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS territoryId INT;
